title: Review and approve a candidate batch
preconditions: The manifest is owner-only, immutable, compatible with the current INGEST and LEDGER contracts, and contains complete candidate and reconciliation outcomes.
postconditions: One exact immutable manifest revision is either explicitly approved or remains unapproved and uncommittable; no source-derived financial field was edited and no LEDGER mutation occurred.
main_flow: 1. The owner or Agent Host inspects batch identity, source fingerprint, account mapping, candidate counts, exclusions, exact duplicates, blocked conflicts, and available reconciliation evidence. 2. INGEST distinguishes transaction-bearing records from explicitly excluded non-transaction records. 3. The owner resolves only permitted decisions such as canonical account selection or an exact duplicate conflict. 4. Any decision change produces a new manifest revision and a new preview. 5. When every transaction-bearing record is accepted or proven an exact duplicate and no blocking ambiguity remains, the owner explicitly approves the exact manifest revision for commit.
alt_flows: 1a. Review finds an unexplained row, total mismatch, ambiguous semantic duplicate, or unsupported finance meaning -> keep the batch blocked
3a. The owner attempts to edit amount, currency, date, or original description -> require a corrected source/new preview instead of changing provenance
4a. Adapter or LEDGER contract changed after preview -> invalidate approval and require a compatible new preview
5a. Approval is absent or refers to another revision -> reject commit before mutation
metadata: {"depth_tier":3,"primary_actor":"P1","trigger":"A deterministic preview produced an Import Manifest revision.","status":"draft"}
